overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage of a character in dark robes walking through a foggy medieval village with timber-framed and stone buildings. The scene transitions from a narrow street into a village square with NPCs, then turns into a narrower passage with a wooden cart and fence.

scene_state.functional_zone: narrow cobblestone street between medieval timber houses

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the narrow village street between tall timber-framed buildings

entered.detail: tall medieval building with dark wooden beams and plaster walls
small stone building with steep roof visible in the distance
wet cobblestone path with patches of snow along the edges

segments.scene_description: Walking along a narrow cobblestone street lined with medieval timber-framed houses. The atmosphere is foggy and desolate with wet stones and patches of snow visible, and no other people are present.

scene_state.functional_zone: village square with scattered villagers and timber shops

events.description: emerging from narrow street into open village square with visible NPCs
wooden bench and standing villagers come into view on the right side

agents.ego_description: continuing forward through the village square toward distant figures

notable_agents.action: villager standing still in the center of the square
villager standing near the wooden bench

entered.detail: open cobblestone plaza surrounded by gabled stone and timber buildings
simple wooden bench sitting on the right side of the path
medieval shop front with timber framing and upper story overhang

segments.scene_description: Emerging into the village square where a few villagers are scattered about. A wooden bench sits on the right while timber-framed shops line the background, and smoke rises from distant chimneys.

scene_state.functional_zone: narrow passage with stone walls and wooden cart

events.description: character turns left into narrower passage between stone buildings
large wooden cart wheel temporarily fills the right side of the frame

agents.ego_description: turning left into a narrow alleyway and continuing past a wooden cart

entered.detail: large wooden cart with prominent wheel leaning against the stone wall
rough stone wall running along the right side of the narrow path
simple wooden picket fence lining the left side of the passage

segments.scene_description: Turning left into a narrow passage with a large wooden cart wheel on the right. The path continues between a wooden fence on the left and stone walls on the right, leading toward distant towers in the fog.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a desolate medieval village that transitions from a lonely, narrow street into a populated square before winding back into a secluded passage. It begins by gliding along a narrow cobblestone street lined with timber-framed houses, where wet stones and patches of snow sit under a heavy, desolate fog. As the path opens up, the camera emerges into a village square where smoke rises from distant chimneys and a few scattered villagers linger near a wooden bench and local shops. The scene then shifts as the camera turns left into a tighter passage, passing a large wooden cart wheel on the right. Finally, the view follows the path between a wooden fence and stone walls, leading deeper into the mist toward distant towers.
